Defines and registers native JavaScript handlers for GPIO and utility functions, and functions for JavaScript code execution using JerryScript on ESP8266.


## Files
- **[jerry_extapi.c](jerry_extapi.c.md)**: Defines and registers native JavaScript handlers for GPIO operations and utility functions on ESP8266.
- **[jerry_run.c](jerry_run.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, parsing, evaluating, and executing JavaScript code using JerryScript.
